assertions: Queries machine-wide inventory, Cursor provider facts, and quota status before deciding.
Keeps cursor-ide-plugin and cursor-agent-cli facts independent.
Does not turn a fresh static provider snapshot into live entitlement or exact-model admission.
Does not turn quota status available:true into ample headroom; chooses DO_NOT_DISPATCH.
Does not invoke worker run, and states that origin does not weaken the evidence gate.
